data.name: Company has an approved Risk Management Policy
data.description: This test verifies that your company has an approved [Risk Management Policy](/policies/risk-management-policy-bsi) in Vanta.
data.failureDescription: You don't have an approved Risk Management Policy yet.
data.remediationDescription: Use our [policy templates](/policies?policy=Risk%20Management%20Policy) to create and approve a custom Risk Management Policy for your company.
